And the light green positions also changed:

charcoal_col = 10 + (lower_width - 8) = 10 + lower_width - 8 = lower_width + 2

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current state: (0, 1) = (52, 16, 4)
# Check charcoal position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current state (0, 1):")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'N', 'W']:
        b = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        if n['pixels'] <= 50 or n['color'] == 'W':
            print(f"  color={n['color']} rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Try remaining states: (0, 2), (1, -2), (1, -1), (1, 0), (1, 1), (1, 2)
# From (0, 1), click blue block 3 once to reach (0, 2)
print("\nTrying (0, 2):")
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 37, 'col': 1}])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        b = n['boundary']
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        print(f"  white rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} width={max(cols)-min(cols)+1}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

if not last_action_result.get('level_completed', False):
    # Reset to (0, 0) by clicking blue block 4 twice
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 1}, {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 1}])
    
    # Try (1, -2): click blue block 1 once, then blue block 4 twice
    print("\nTrying (1, -2):")
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 17, 'col': 1}, {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 1}, {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 1}])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'W':
            b = n['boundary']
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            print(f"  white rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} width={max(cols)-min(cols)+1}")
    print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
    
    if not last_action_result.get('level_completed', False):
        # Try (1, -1): click blue block 3 once
        print("\nTrying (1, -1):")
        action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 37, 'col': 1}])
        seg = current_frame.segmentation
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            if n['color'] == 'W':
                b = n['boundary']
                cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                print(f"  white rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} width={max(cols)-min(cols)+1}")
        print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
        
        if not last_action_result.get('level_completed', False):
            # Try (1, 0): click blue block 3 again
            print("\nTrying (1, 0):")
            action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 37, 'col': 1}])
            seg = current_frame.segmentation
            for n in seg['nodes']:
                if n['color'] == 'W':
                    b = n['boundary']
                    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                    print(f"  white rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} width={max(cols)-min(cols)+1}")
            print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
